observations.correspondence_rationale: The quote reflects the biblical teaching in Matthew 6:19-21 about the futility of accumulating earthly treasures that cannot be taken beyond death, emphasizing devotion to eternal rather than temporal things.
observations.summary: Dan's rejection of devoting life to things that cannot be carried into death explicitly alludes to Jesus' teaching on storing treasures in heaven rather than on earth.

evidence.quote: "Abundance of things?" Dan spat, his voice cracking with brine. "Why devote my life to things I cannot carry into death?"
